title: Solar-Powered Water Purification System
description: A portable water purification device utilizing concentrated solar energy to eliminate microorganisms and chemical contaminants from water sources. The system employs a parabolic solar collector combined with UV sterilization to achieve high levels of pathogen removal suitable for rural deployment.

title: AI-Driven Crop Disease Detection Using Drone Imagery
description: An automated system for detecting plant diseases in agricultural fields using deep learning analysis of multispectral drone imagery. The method uses convolutional neural networks trained on labeled datasets to identify early-stage infections and generate prescription maps for targeted pesticide application.

title: Blockchain-Based Academic Credential Verification
description: A decentralized platform for issuing, storing, and verifying academic credentials using blockchain technology. Institutions can issue tamper-proof digital certificates that can be independently verified by employers without reliance on a central authority.

title: Biodegradable Polymer for Food Packaging
description: A novel biodegradable polymer composite derived from agricultural waste materials including rice husk and sugarcane bagasse. The material exhibits comparable mechanical strength to conventional plastic packaging while fully degrading within 90 days under composting conditions.

title: Low-Cost Prosthetic Hand with Myoelectric Control
description: An affordable upper-limb prosthetic device controlled by surface electromyography signals from the residual limb. The design uses 3D-printed components and an embedded microcontroller to achieve individual finger actuation at a fraction of the cost of commercial alternatives.

title: Smart Traffic Signal Optimization Using IoT Sensors
description: An intelligent traffic management system that dynamically adjusts signal timing based on real-time vehicle density data collected from IoT-enabled inductive loop sensors and computer vision cameras at intersections. The system reduces average commute times by adapting to peak-hour traffic patterns.

title: Electrochemical Sensor for Heavy Metal Detection in Water
description: A portable electrochemical biosensor capable of detecting trace concentrations of heavy metals such as lead, arsenic, and cadmium in drinking water. The sensor uses a modified graphene oxide electrode to achieve parts-per-billion sensitivity suitable for field deployment.

title: Machine Learning Model for Earthquake Early Warning
description: A real-time earthquake detection framework that applies machine learning to seismograph data streams for rapid P-wave identification and magnitude estimation. The system provides seconds to minutes of advance warning to population centers downstream of the epicenter.

title: Nano-Enhanced Concrete for Earthquake-Resistant Structures
description: A high-performance concrete mix incorporating carbon nanotube additives to improve tensile strength and ductility. The material is designed for seismically active regions and demonstrates superior crack resistance and energy absorption capacity under cyclic loading.

title: Wearable Device for Non-Invasive Blood Glucose Monitoring
description: A wrist-worn biosensor device that estimates blood glucose concentration using near-infrared spectroscopy without the need for a finger-prick blood sample. The device transmits readings to a smartphone app and provides trend analysis and hypoglycemia alerts.
